OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION FOR AN ORDER TRANSFERRING THE ACTION TO THE PROPER COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT NAVISTAR, INC.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT NAVISTAR, INC.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TRANSFERRING THE ACTION TO THE PROPER COURT; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST LAW OFFICES OF CARCIONE, CATTERMOLE IN THE AMOUNT OF $5810.00 - THE MOTION TO TRANSFER PURSUANT TO CCP 396B IS DENIED. DEFENDANT NAVISTAR IS NOT ENTITLED TO HAVE THIS ACTION TRANSFERRED TO SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY. SEE BEUTKE V. AMERICAN SECURITIES CO (1955) 132 CAL.APP.2D 354, 361 ("WE ARE THEREFORE OF THE OPINION THAT IF AN ACTION IS NOT COMMENCED IN A PROPER COUNTY, AS SET FORTH IN THE CONSTITUTION AND STATUTES, THE CORPORATION MAY CHANGE THE VENUE TO THE COUNTY OF ITS RESIDENCE, BUT THERE IS NO AUTHORITY FOR CHANGING IT TO SOME OTHER COUNTY IN WHICH THE PLAINTIFF COULD HAVE BROUGHT THE ACTION.") THE COURT DENIES THE REQUESTS FOR FEES. THIS ORDER IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A MOTION TO TRANSFER THE CASE ON OTHER GROUNDS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Order Transferring The Action To The Proper Court; Req. For Snactions Against Law Offices Of Carcione, Cattermole; Etc In The Amount Of $5810.00
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NAVISTAR, INC.'s Motion For An Order Transferring The Action To The Proper Court; Request For Sanctions Against Law Offices Of Carcione, Cattermole In The Amount Of $5810.00 - The motion to transfer pursuant to CCP 396b is denied. Defendant Navistar is not entitled to have this action transferred to San Joaquin County. See Beutke v. American Securities Co (1955) 132 Cal.App.2d 354, 361 ("We are therefore of the opinion that if an action is not commenced in a proper county, as set forth in the Constitution and statutes, the corporation may change the venue to the county of its residence, but there is no authority for changing it to some other county in which the plaintiff could have brought the action.") The Court denies the requests for fees. This order is without prejudice to a motion to transfer the case on other grounds. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Continued To Feb-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NAVISTAR, INC.s Motion For An Order Transferring The Action To The Proper Court; Request For Sanctions Against Law Offices Of Carcione, Cattermole In The Amount Of $5810.00 is Continued on the Court's own motion to February 6, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than December 21, 2012 at 4 pm. The Court has courtesy copies of the motion and reply. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976.
